sourceSignals.claim: The V2 non-collecting public-at-opening form passes 32 of 32 machine fixtures plus keyboard and responsive browser evidence.
All four L0 SWUs are complete, so the pack is historical execution evidence rather than a current handoff.

sourceSignals.claim: The recorded next route points to the already completed SWU-FORM-001.

sourceSignals.claim: Manual screen-reader, native-IME and five-person retell evidence remains unrun.

sourceSignals.claim: Admission, Node and SQLite stack, editing, live moderation and retention choices are now selected.

sourceSignals.claim: Initial messages are public at opening only; participant private return is deferred.
sourceSignals.evidence: D-15 explicitly removes participant keys, private return and the second encryption layer from the initial capsule.

sourceSignals.claim: The selected close uses tlock and drand, Arweave, emergency 3-of-5, a direct Bitcoin commitment and the containing block as the ritual number signal.
sourceSignals.evidence: D-11 through D-16 select the initial close, recovery, commitment, number and no-scheduled-maintenance model.

sourceSignals.claim: The existing high-complexity plan predates the V2 form, selected stack, public-at-opening-only decision and selected close/recovery architecture.
sourceSignals.evidence: Direct comparison of the work-pack and layer model against RS-01 and RS-06 through RS-08.

sourceSignals.claim: Invoke Plan must repair the graph before any backend Task Session.
sourceSignals.evidence: Distill rejects the whole live-intake and decade-recovery bundle as one executable unit.

proposedChanges: Close the two-hour pack as completed L0 and replace its stale route.
Map V2 machine evidence into the revised live-intake plan while preserving human gates.
Regenerate the human matrix for Fixture V2.
Carry D-02 through D-06 as decisions, not implementation proof.
Defer private return outside the initial release graph.
Add public-at-opening close, recovery, Bitcoin commitment and ritual-number planning.
Author and validate Live Intake Plan V2 before Task Session.
Synchronize Inventory only after the revised plan validates.
skippedChanges: No existing target artifact was edited in proposal-only mode.
No target task, backend, database, deployment or ceremony work was executed.
No blocker was resolved from decision evidence alone.
blockers: Manual access and consequence-retell evidence remains unrun.
The high-complexity dependency graph needs revised Invoke Plan ownership.
Public-live, operations, close and recovery proofs remain absent.
unresolvedGaps: Whether synthetic schema work may run beside the manual comprehension track must be decided in the revised plan.

Public owner and long-horizon recovery gates remain open.
